title: Department Of Engineering To Host Public Meeting For South Ave Bridge
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering will host a public meeting on March 24, 2026, to present plans for rehabilitating the South Avenue Bridge over Onondaga Creek. The $-unspecified project includes bearing replacement, sidewalk reconstruction, masonry repair, and deck sealing, with online comment period extending to April 10.

entity_refs.name: Seals Community Center at Kirk Park

political_signal.description: Mayor Owens frames bridge rehabilitation as critical infrastructure investment aligned with public safety and connectivity priorities; proactive community engagement signals commitment to transparent capital planning.

processing_notes: No project budget or timeline disclosed in release
